name: Planetary Explorer — Resilience
description: Operational resilience dossiers fusing weather, supply graph, and Fabric facility data. Ask which facilities are at risk and why — get scored, evidence-grounded answers.

conversation_starters.title: TX heat dome risk this week
conversation_starters.text: Which of our Texas facilities are at risk from the heat dome over the next 7 days?

conversation_starters.title: Wildfire smoke exposure
conversation_starters.text: Show wildfire and smoke risk across all facilities for the next 10 days, ranked by criticality.

conversation_starters.title: Supply blast-radius
conversation_starters.text: If our Austin fab goes offline this weekend due to heat, which downstream facilities are affected?

conversation_starters.title: List facilities
conversation_starters.text: What facilities do I have access to in the resilience registry?
